# Upthrust

> Upthrust is a D2C ecommerce marketing agency that helps online brands scale profitably through paid ads, scroll-stopping creatives, SEO, and conversion-focused web design. Founded in 2021. 60+ brands scaled. $50M+ in ad spend managed. Average 3.8x ROAS.

Upthrust works exclusively with ecommerce and D2C brands spending $30K+/month on ads. 1 in 7 Shark Tank India brands work with Upthrust. The team of 25+ includes performance marketers, designers, strategists, and UGC creators.

## Services

- [D2C Marketing Agency](https://upthrust.agency/d2c-marketing-agency): Full-funnel performance marketing for D2C ecommerce brands. Meta Ads, Google Ads, multi-channel attribution, daily optimization. Average 3.8x ROAS, scaling brands to $500K+/month.
- [Meta Ads Agency](https://upthrust.agency/meta-ad-agency): Facebook and Instagram ad management for ecommerce. Performance creative testing, 20–30 new ads per month, CAC reduction of 30–50%.
- [Google Ads Agency](https://upthrust.agency/google-ad-agency): Google Ads management including Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns for ecommerce brands.
- [SEO Agency](https://upthrust.agency/seo-agency): SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and AI visibility strategies focused on revenue growth, not just rankings.
- [Performance Marketing Agency](https://upthrust.agency/performance-marketing-agency): Multi-channel performance marketing combining Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, and CRO into one integrated growth system.
- [Creative Agency](https://upthrust.agency/creative-agency): Scroll-stopping creatives — UGC videos, static ads, reels, carousels, and performance editing. 200+ UGC videos produced. Winners identified in 3–5 days.
- [Video Production Agency](https://upthrust.agency/video-production-agency): Data-driven video production including UGC-style ads, founder videos, testimonials, skits, and sound-first Reels for ecommerce brands.

## Pages

- [Home](https://upthrust.agency/): Agency overview, services, case studies, pricing, testimonials, and booking.
- [About](https://upthrust.agency/about-us): Company mission, team, and founding story.
- [Creative Library](https://upthrust.agency/#creative-library): 50+ brands, 200+ UGC videos produced for D2C clients.
- [Case Studies](https://upthrust.agency/#case-studies): Real results from D2C brands scaled by Upthrust.
- [Pricing](https://upthrust.agency/#pricing): Service pricing and packages.

## Key Stats

- 60+ D2C brands scaled
- $50M+ in ad spend managed profitably
- Average 3.8x ROAS across clients
- Average CTR: 8.2%
- 20–30 new creatives produced per month per client
- 1 in 7 Shark Tank India brands are Upthrust clients
- Team size: 25+
